verses.text: Moab gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a genin-ah: “Nebo mite in gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gam uh a kisia ding hi. Kiriathaim khua kila khinzo a, a kulhpite uh cim khinta hi. A mite in maizumna thuak uh a

Moab gam a minthan'na beita hi. Heshbon khua-ah a galte un a simna ding uh vaihawm uh a, ‘Hong pai un, Moab gam i beimangsak ding hi,’ a ci uh hi. Madmen khua aw, nang zong na gamdai ta ding hi. Namsau in nang hong nungdelh ding hi
Ngai dih un! Horonaim khua-ah mi kiko a, ‘Ngongtatna leh siatna lianpi,’ a ci uh hi
“Moab gam kisusia khinta a, a kahna aw uh Zoar khua dongin a kiza hi
Luhith mual kahtohna lampi-ah a paikawmun a kap uh hi. Horonaim khua-ah a tuahsuk laitakun khuapi siatna hangin a kikona aw uh a za uh hi
‘Tai un! Na suahtakna dingun tai un! Sehnel gama gamlak late bangin taimang un!’ a ci uh hi
“Na hatnate uh leh na neihsate uh na suan' manun note zong hong kipai khiatpih ding hi. Na pasian uh Khemosh zong a siampi teng leh a ulian teng tawh, kipai khiatpih ding hi
Khua khempeuh kisia khin ding a, khat beek a suakta kei ding hi. Topa in ka gensa bangin mualkuam leh zangleite a kisia ding uh hi
Moab mite a leen'khiat theihna dingun a kha ding uh pia un. A khuapite uh gamlak suak ding a, kuamah a teng kei ding hi
“ Topa' na citakin a semlopa in kamsiatna thuak ta hen. Thahna dingin a namsau a doklopa in hamsiatna thuak ta hen

Moab gam a neu lai-a kipanin nuamtakin a om den ahi hi. Gamdangah kipai khiatpih ngeilo a, thawl khat pan thawl khatah a kitei kawikawi leenggahzu tawh kibanglo hi. A limna kilamdang ngeilo a, a gimnam zong kikhel ngeilo hi

“Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Moab mite leenggahzu buak bangin a buakhia ding mi kong paisak hun hong tung ding hi. Amaute in a thawl a hawm dong bungkhia-in, tua khit ciangin a thawl sukhamzan ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite, a muan' uh Bethel pasian in a maizumsak mah bangin Moab mite, a biak uh Khemosh pasian in a maizumsak ding hi
Note in bang hangin, ‘Galhangte ka hi uh a, galsim hatte ka hi uh hi,’ ci thei na hi uh hiam
Moab gam leh a khuapite a susia dingpa hong paito ta hi. A tangval hoihpente uh thahlup dingin kipaipih khinzo hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa a kici keimah Kumpipa in kong gen hi
Moab gam a kisiat ding sawt nawnlo a, a gimna ding hong naita hi
“A kiima tengte leh a min a thei mite aw, Moab gam kah un. ‘A minthan'na bei khinta a, a vangliatna kumpi ciangkhut kitan ta hi,’ci un
Dibon khua-a teng mite aw, na minthan'na uh mun sang panin hong kumsuk un la, leivui lakah hong tu un! Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab hong sim dingte hong paita a, na kulhte uh hong suksiatsak zo uh hi
Aroer khua-a teng mite aw, lam gei-ah dingin na en un! A hong galtai numei leh pasalte kiangah, ‘Bang thu piang ahi hiam?’ ci-in dong un
Moab gam kisia khinzo a, zumhuaina thuak khinzo hi. Thum un la kah un! Arnon gun dungah, Moab gam kisiatna thu va gen un
“Pasian' thukhenna, mualtung gamteng leh Holon khua, Jahzah khua, Mefaath khua
Dibon khua, Nebo khua, Bethdiblathaim khua
Kiriathaim khua, Bethgamul khua, Bethmeon khua
Kerioth khua, leh Bozrah khua-a kipan Moab gamsung a gamla, a nai-a om khuapi khempeuhah hong tungzo hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, Moab gam' hatna teng bei khinta hi. A hatna leh a vangliatna teng kisuksiatsak hi
“Moab, zu khamsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa langpangin kiliansak hi. Tua ahih manin ama luak mahah amah bual ding a, mi khempeuh in awi-in a nuihsan ding uh hi
Moab aw, nang zong Israel mite nuihsan hilo na hi hiam? Ama thu na gen simin lungdamin na lu na sin'sin', amah guta sa na hi hiam
Moab gama teng mite aw, khuapite nusia un la, kawl lakah teng un! Keen pangah vakhu bu bawl bangin va om un
Moab' kiphatsakna ka za khinzo a, kiphasak pha mahmah hi. Kiliansakin kisathei a, kuamah thusim loin mite a neu-et hi
Ama hehna ka thei a, a kisialhna teng zuaupi hi-in, a sepna teng zong zuaupi mah ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Tua ahih manin Moab-a' dingin ka tau hi. Moab gammi khempeuh-a' dingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua-a' dingin zong ka thum hi

Sibmah khua aw, Jazer khua-a' ding sangin nang-a' dingin ka nak kahzaw hi. Nang pen leenggah gui zam bangin na hiangte in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua dongah na zam suak hi. Na khuakhal ante leh na leenggahte hong kisuksiatsak ta hi

Leihoih mahmah Moab gamah lungdamna leh kipahna a beita hi. Leenggah cilna panin leenggahzu ka luangkhiasak nawn kei a, leenggah cilin lungdamin kuamah a kiko nawn kei a, a kikona uh lungdam kikona hilo hi

“Heshbon khua panin Elealeh khua leh Jahaz dongah, Zoar khua panin Horonaim khua leh Eglathshelishiah khua dongah mite' kahna aw kiza hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Nimrim tui nangawn keu ta a, kisusia ta hi
Moab gam mualsang tungah biakna pia a, milim pasian-te tungah paknamtui a hal mite, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua bang ka hihsak nawn kei ding hi
Tua ahih manin Moab-a' dingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua mite-a' dingin misi vuina tamngai kitum bangin ka kapkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neih a lam khempeuh uh kisiamang khinta hi
“Mi khempeuh in a lu uh mettol uh a, a khamul uh kiatsiang uh hi. A khutte uh kuikek uh a, a kawng uhah puanhampi a teng uh hi
Moab gam innkhum khempeuh leh lam lianpi khempeuhah kahna bekbek a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, leibeel suktap bangin Moab gam ka sutam a, kuamah in phamawh a sa kei hi
Moab gam kitam ta! A mite kap! Maizumin hong nungngat ta! Tua ahih manin amah pen mite' nuihsat ding leh lipkhap ding a suakzo hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, muvanlai leeng bangin manlang takin gam khat hong leeng ding a, Moab gam a sim dingin a kha hong zal ding hi
A khuapite kila-in a kulhpite zong kila ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Moab galkapte nupi nausuak ding bangin a lau ding uh hi
Moab kisusia ding a, a minamin a om nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa demin a kiliansak uh hi
Moab gama teng mite aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, launa, dum leh thangte in note hong pang

Lauhuaina pan a taisim mite dum sungah a kia ding hi. Dum sung panin a hong kahkhiato mite, thangah a awk veve ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gim ka piak ni-in hih thute ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi

A bahgawp galtaite in Heshbon khua hong beel uh hi. Ahih hangin Sihon kumpipa a maan'na ngei Heshbon khua panin meikuang hong kipankhia veve hi. Gal a simnuam mite' ten'na Moab gam, a gammong dongin mualsangte zong a kangtum hi
Moab aw, gimna na thuak ding hi. Khemosh pasian a bia mite si khinta uh hi. Na tapate uh sal dingin kipaipih khin a, na tanute uh zong thongkia dingin kipaipih hi
“Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, nidang ciangin Moab gam a ngei bangsakin ka hausak kik ding hi,” a ci hi. Moab tungah thukhenna tu-a zah ahi hi.
